patterns.tabstrip-delegation: ShellFooter wraps TabStrip and passes tabs, showAddTab, overflowMode, and overflowTabs. When showMore is true and overflowTabs has items, overflowMode is manual; otherwise none. Active tabs display a pin icon.
patterns.variant-height: The variant prop controls height: default uses --shell-footer-height-default, compact uses --shell-footer-height-compact.

events.name: click
events.description: Clicks on footer links or actions

examples.name: Standard with sidebars
examples.description: Full layout with left and right sidebars

examples.name: Standard minimal
examples.description: Minimal layout with header and footer only

examples.name: Default footer
examples.description: Footer with tab strip and add-tab button
